---
title: "About"
---

Lecturer-in-charge: [Dr Thiyanga S. Talagala, Senior Lectuer, University of Sri Jayewardenepura](https://thiyanga.netlify.app/).

## Lecture 1: 24 May 2026

Topics to cover:

-   Introduction to R and RStudio

-   Data structures

-   **Simplifying vector creation**

-   Handling missing values

-   Logical operators

Additional reading: [Chapter 1, Chapter 2](https://thiyangt.github.io/rbook/)

## Lecture 2: 7 July 2026

Link to the [book](https://thiyangt.github.io/rbook/)

-   Logical operators: Chapter 5

-   Data import and export: In-class demo

-   Documenting with RMarkdown: In-class demo

-   Introduction to tidyverse: Chapter 7

-   tibble, pipe operator, factors: Chapter 7

-   Data wrangling with tidyr and dplyr: Chapter 8

[Script file](scr1.R)

[Rmarkdown file](lesson2.Rmd)
